changes.description: Set consistent 24px inter-section gap on mobile homepage via --inv-mobile-section-gap token
Added flush-stack exceptions for hero → promos → banners that should have 0 gap between them
changes.after: Added margin-top: 0 for hero+next, promos+next, and adjacent banners

changes.description: Normalised all content section internal padding to 20px top / 16px bottom on mobile
Full-bleed hero/banner/promo sections retain 0 padding with !important to beat inline styles
Updated featured-collection internal padding from var(--inv-mobile-section-gap) to 20px/16px
changes.after: padding: 20px 0 16px; margin-bottom: 12px on titles; margin-top: 16px on view-all

changes.description: Tightened featured collection header-to-grid gap (12px) and grid-to-button gap (16px)
changes.before: No explicit rules for these gaps
changes.after: title-wrapper margin-bottom: 12px; view-all margin-top: 16px; explicit row-gap/column-gap: 10px

changes.description: Updated brand strip (OUR BRANDS) padding from 8px to 20px/16px
Updated review carousel padding from 4px/8px to 20px/16px

design_decisions: Full-bleed image sections (hero, promos, image banners) retain 0 padding and 0 margin between them for visual continuity
Used !important on 4 rule groups to override inline Liquid padding (section containers, banner sections, hero, promos)
Inter-section gap uses existing --inv-mobile-section-gap token (24px) with 24px fallback
Content section padding uses absolute values (20px/16px) rather than tokens since no existing token matches the asymmetric values
Product grid gap unchanged at 10px (both row-gap and column-gap) as it was already appropriate
Title-wrapper margin-bottom reduced from default to 12px for tighter header-to-grid spacing
View-all button margin-top set to 16px for consistent grid-to-button spacing
